0100 SYSPROG  SYS1                IBMUSER  NONE          Systems programming group
0200 JDOE001             SYSPROG       YES  NO   NO                       JOHN DOE             SYSPROG                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           YES
0200 MARYADM             SYSPROG       NO   NO   YES                      MARY ADMIN           APPGRP                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            NO                                                                                                                                                          RSTD
0205 JDOE001  SYSPROG                                          CONTROL             YES  NO   NO             NO
0205 MARYADM  APPGRP                                           READ                NO   NO   YES            NO
0400 PROD.PAYROLL.**                                     YES             SYSPROG                                                NONE          NONE
0404 PROD.PAYROLL.**                                     PAYGRP   READ
0404 PROD.PAYROLL.**                                     ADMGRP   ALTER
0500 CICSPROD.STC                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           STARTED                      SYSPROG                                                NONE     NONE
0500 BPX.SUPERUSER                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          FACILITY                     IBMUSER                                                NONE     FAIL
0500 TERM001                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                TERMINAL                     IBMUSER                                                NONE     NONE
0505 CICSPROD.STC                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           STARTED  CICSRACF READ
0505 BPX.SUPERUSER                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          FACILITY OMVSADM  READ
0505 TERM001                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                TERMINAL SOMEUSER READ
